title: NovaPay - Embedded Payments Platform - Product Brief
author: Robert Chen, VP of Product

sections.heading: Product Vision
sections.content: NovaPay is an embedded payments platform that enables SaaS companies to add financial services to their products in days, not months. Our mission is to democratize access to fintech infrastructure.

sections.heading: Problem Statement
sections.content: Building payment features requires navigating complex regulations, establishing banking relationships, and building specialized infrastructure. This typically takes 12-18 months and costs $500K-2M.

sections.heading: Solution
sections.content: NovaPay provides pre-built payment APIs, compliance infrastructure, and banking relationships through a single integration, reducing time-to-market to 2-4 weeks.

sections.heading: Core Features
sections.content: Payment processing (cards, ACH, wire), wallet management, KYC/AML compliance, fraud detection, and real-time reporting are included out of the box.

sections.heading: Target Market
sections.content: Primary: B2B SaaS companies with $5M-50M ARR looking to monetize payments. Secondary: Marketplace platforms needing multi-party payment splits.

sections.heading: Pricing Model
sections.content: Revenue share model: 0.5% of payment volume processed through the platform, plus $0.10 per transaction. No monthly minimums for the first 12 months.

sections.heading: Roadmap
sections.content: Q2 2024: Crypto payment support. Q3 2024: International expansion (EU/UK). Q4 2024: Buy-now-pay-later integration.
